attributes.description:
Controls the minimum height of the barcode scanner component. This determines the minimum vertical space the component occupies.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-min-height

Controls the minimum width of the barcode scanner component. This determines the minimum horizontal space the component occupies.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-min-width

Sets the text color of the barcode scanner component. This determines what color the text appears in.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-text-color

Controls the size of the text in the barcode scanner component. This affects how large the text appears.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-text-font-size

Sets the left padding of the text in the barcode scanner component. This creates spacing to the left of the text.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-text-padding-left

Sets the color of the icon in the barcode scanner component. This determines what color the icon appears in.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-icon-color

Controls the size of the icon in the barcode scanner component. This affects how large the icon appears.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-icon-font-size

Sets the background color of the barcode scanner component. This is the main background color that appears behind all content.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-background

Sets the top padding of the barcode scanner component. This creates spacing at the top of the component.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-padding-top

Sets the left padding of the barcode scanner component. This creates spacing on the left side of the component.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-padding-left

Sets the bottom padding of the barcode scanner component. This creates spacing at the bottom of the component.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-padding-bottom

Sets the right padding of the barcode scanner component. This creates spacing on the right side of the component.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-padding-right

Controls the border thickness of the barcode scanner component. This determines how thick the border around the component appears.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-border-width

Sets the border style of the barcode scanner component. Acceptable values: solid, dashed, dotted.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-border-style

Sets the border color of the barcode scanner component. This determines what color the border around the component appears in.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-border-color

Controls the border radius for rounded corners of the barcode scanner component. This makes the component appear with rounded corners instead of sharp edges.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-border-radius

Sets the ripple effect color for the barcode scanner component. This determines what color appears when the component is interacted with.
CSS variable: --wm-barcodescanner-ripple-color
